rationale.P01: DiskPressure=True on node ip-10-0-3-21 (node_disk_used_pct 71 to 97 and holding), never auto-resolved, pat-diskpressure-evict surging 9x with negative sentiment and active pod-eviction risk for play-svc. SEV1 cardinal must-page.
rationale.P23: DiskPressure=True on a second node ip-10-0-7-88 (node_disk_used_pct 74 to 99 and holding), never auto-resolved, pat-diskpressure-evict-7-88 surging 7.4x negative with kubelet already evicting ingest-router pods. Independent SEV1 from a different node/root than P01. Must-page.
rationale.P24: PVC clickhouse-keeper-data-0 at 100% (pvc_used_pct 86 to 100 and pinned), never auto-resolved, pat-pvc-full-writefail negative with active write failures on a stateful service. delta_vs_baseline_pct is 0 (volume of failures flat) so it looks quiet, but the metric is pinned at full and writes are failing. SEV1 must-page.
rationale.P21: Downstream symptom of P01 (shares pat-diskpressure-evict root): kube-state-metrics scrape failures on the same pressured node ip-10-0-3-21. Collapse into the P01 eviction incident; do not page separately.
rationale.P02: [ignore]-prefixed Default Log Threshold Monitor on http-receiver: 18 fires/hr, self-clears in ~20s, pat-log-threshold flat/neutral. Flapper noise.

notes: Three independent real incidents page: P01 (node ip-10-0-3-21 disk-pressure eviction), P23 (a second node ip-10-0-7-88 disk-pressure eviction, different node/root), and P24 (clickhouse-keeper PVC at 100% with write failures). P21 is the downstream scrape-failure symptom of P01 and collapses into it. Everything else is [ignore] log-threshold flapping or self-healing disk-usage warnings. P24 is the precision/recall hinge: its pattern delta reads flat like noise, but pvc_used_pct pinned at 100%, SEV1, and never auto-resolving mark it real.
